title: Audit function IAM and execution limits
description: Review a function's execution role for least privilege and its memory/timeout/concurrency config against its workload.
body: Use when checking a function's configuration. Actions: read the execution role for wildcard actions or resources and unused permissions, and check memory/timeout/reserved-concurrency against what the handler actually does and calls. Report wildcards, missing reserved concurrency on downstream-heavy functions, and timeout/downstream mismatches with severity. Do not change live config. This skill exposes capability only and must not modify production configuration without runtime permission. Validation signals include a role with no wildcards and limits sized to the workload. Risk boundary: wildcard IAM and unbounded concurrency on database-touching functions are blocking; recommend tightening and escalation.
